name: Egg Braid
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup cold butter or margarine, cut into 4 pieces
1 egg for sesame or poppy seeds (optional)
recipeInstructions:
Makes 1 loaf
1. Combine 1/4 cup water, yeast, and sugar. Stir to dissolve yeast and let stand until bubbly, about 5 minutes.
2. Fit the processor with the steel blade.
3. Measure flour, dry milk, butter, and salt into the work bowl. Process until mixed, about 15 seconds.
4. Add yeast mixture to flour mixture. Process until blended, about 10 seconds.
5. Turn on the processor and slowly drizzle the 2 beaten eggs through the feed tube and just enough remaining water so the dough forms a ball that cleans the sides of the bowl. Process until the ball turns around the bowl about 25 times.
6. Turn off the processor and let the dough stand for 1 to 2 minutes.
7. Turn on the processor and gradually drizzle in enough remaining water to make the dough soft, smooth, and satiny but not sticky. Process until the dough turns around the bowl about 15 times.
8. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface. Shape into a ball and place in a lightly greased bowl, turning to grease all sides. Cover with plastic wrap and let stand in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour.
9. Punch down the dough. Divide into 3 equal parts. Shape each part into a strand about 18 inches long. Braid the strands loosely together. Tuck ends under and pinch to seal. Fit the braid into a greased 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2 inch loaf pan. Cover loosely with plastic wrap and let stand in a warm place until almost doubled, about 1 hour.
10. Heat oven to 375°F. Beat the remaining egg with a fork. Brush egg over braid. Sprinkle sesame or poppy seeds over braid if desired. Bake until evenly browned, 25-30 minutes.
11. Remove immediately from pan and cool on a wire rack.
REFRIGERATOR EGG BRAID:
Prepare dough through step 1 (first rising) and shape into braid as directed for Egg Braid. Place in greased loaf pan, brush with vegetable oil, and cover tightly with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for 4 to 24 hours. Uncover and let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes. Bake as directed for Egg Braid.
RAISIN BREAD:
Prepare dough as directed for Egg Braid. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead in 1/2 cup dark raisins into the dough. Continue as directed for Egg Braid, eliminating sesame or poppy seeds.
